title: lemmaphyllum sinense
intro: Lemmaphyllum sinense, also known as Sinensis Lemmaphyllon, is a plant species that belongs to the family Polypodiaceae. It is a type of fern native to China, traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is rich in various bioactive compounds, which have been found to possess health benefits such as antioxidant, anti-cancer, and cardiovascular protective properties. Lemmaphyllum sinense can be used in herbal preparations, including teas, tinctures, and infusions, to take advantage of its medicinal and health benefits.
